p.em: Control Flow: Hardware Exception → Context Save → Decode → Handler Logic

div.p: asm ; ISR Entry Point ; [rsp] = Error Code ; [rsp+8] = RIP push %rax push %rbx
; 1. Capture Faulting Address Immediately mov %cr2, %rax mov %rax, [fault_addr_store]
; 2. Access Error Code (at current rsp + 16) mov %rbx, [rsp + 16]
CR2 Volatility: The mov %cr2, %reg instruction must be executed immediately. Subsequent page faults (even nested ones) will overwrite the CR2 register.
